parsed_output.justification: Dylan explicitly admitted to being the Werewolf multiple times (lines 93, 137, 170), although he later claimed he was swapped with Dustin by the Troublemaker. This admission, combined with his inconsistent claims of being the Hunter and then the Werewolf, makes him the most suspicious player. While Katie's behavior is highly erratic and suggestive of the Tanner, Dylan's direct link to the Werewolf role provides the strongest lead for Team Village.
